name: X-Golf Acton
about: X-Golf Acton is an indoor golf simulator venue in Massachusetts that offers a state-of-the-art golfing experience with advanced technology. They provide accurate swing analysis and realistic gameplay for both beginners and seasoned golfers, with a focus on year-round practice and entertainment. The venue features simulators with camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and dedicated kiosks that offer virtual reality gaming, food and beverages, leagues, lessons, and social events. X-Golf Acton aims to be a go-to destination for practice, parties, or events, maintaining a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere for players of all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate range of virtual golf simulators with 15 years of R&D
Fast play with 18 holes completed in around 60 minutes with no slow groups
Access to world's best courses like Pebble Beach, Bay Hill, and Bethpage Black
PGA professional lessons available to improve your game

food_and_drink.notes: Food available, details on the Food and Drink Menu page.
Full service bar available for drinks.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as X-Golf Acton offers its own full service bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play 18 holes in around 60 minutes with no waiting for slow groups ahead of you.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Acton is family-friendly and welcomes players of all ages, making it a good option for kids.
